headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Micron Technology (MU) After Its Huge AI Memory-Fueled Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether Micron Technology's share price still reflects good value after its huge run, you are not alone. The stock last closed at US$412.37, with a 7 day return of a 2% decline, around flat over 30 days, up 30.7% year to date and up 356.9% over the last year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns are very large. Recent headlines have focused on Micron's role in supplying memory for AI related applications and its position in the semiconductor supply chain, which has kept...
